title: AI Model Query Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Model Query Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#F7F7F7`
* `#C06C88`
* `#B7D7CD`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='50' y='50' width='300' height='200' fill='#F7F7F7' rx='10'/>
  <rect x='120' y='120' width='160' height='40' fill='#C06C88' rx='10'/>
  <text x='140' y='150' font-size='24' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' fill='#000000'>Query Editor</text>
  <text x='120' y='70' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' fill='#666666'>Query History</text>
  <g transform='translate(220, 120)' fill='#B7D7CD'>
    <rect width='40' height='20' rx='10'/>
    <rect x='10' y='10' width='20' height='10' rx='5'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(220, 150)' fill='#B7D7CD'>
    <rect width='40' height='20' rx='10'/>
    <rect x='10' y='10' width='20' height='10' rx='5'/>
  </g>
  <text x='240' y='120' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' fill='#000000'>Refresh</text>
  <text x='240' y='150' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' fill='#000000'>Run</text>
  <rect x='120' y='180' width='160' height='60' fill='#F7F7F7' rx='10'/>
  <text x='140' y='210' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' fill='#666666'>Performance Metrics</text>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Query editor and history should have dynamic height adjustment

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Model Query Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, dynamic height adjustment, query execution, and real-time performance metrics.
Review code cleaness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
